issues.title: Scene expansion pool now generates compact accessories but still maps to the runtime large bucket
evidence: SAFE_SCENE_EXPANSION_TEMPLATES uses small accessory stems with generic packaging/container forms.
The import-time rewrite replaces every scene_expansion_items list before BLIND_BOXES is built.
Sampled runtime values include 交通卡保护套, 口罩收纳盒, 礼品标签托盘, 哨子保护套.

issues.title: Visible-small thin-item cleanup and regression coverage are incomplete
evidence: Runtime values still include thin fragment-like entries such as 备用口罩片, 护腕片, 训练标志片, 面罩擦拭片.
Tests add only a scene_expansion_items structural blocklist and a test-local safe-name allowlist.

residual_risks: The old scene_expansion_items literals remain in source but are dead at runtime, which makes future edits easy to mis-review.
